no_training_executed_yet.claim: No training has been run; plan is design-only
no_training_executed_yet.evidence: No new directories in artifacts/production/true-per-EA-* paths

no_long_experiments_executed_yet.claim: No full-length experiments have been executed
no_long_experiments_executed_yet.evidence: Only planning documents created; no training logs

no_proposed_method_implementation.claim: No proposed method logic will be implemented during execution
no_proposed_method_implementation.evidence: All Figure 8/9/11 configs use proposed_method: 'none (paper-faithful baseline only)'

no_reward_logic_changes.evidence: All configs inherit reward from per-EA-distributed-baseline; credit_assignment: 'per_task_delayed_reward' locked

no_environment_topology_changes.claim: Environment topology and connectivity remain unchanged
no_environment_topology_changes.evidence: All configs use state_representation_profile: 'deadline_queue_feasibility_v1' (same as baseline)

no_metric_definition_changes.claim: Metric definitions (delay, drop ratio, completion, reward) remain unchanged
no_metric_definition_changes.evidence: All configs use reconciliation_profile: 'horizon_aware_recovered_reward_event' (same as baseline)

figure_8_only_hyperparameter_changes.claim: Figure 8 runs only vary learning_rate and gamma; all other params identical to baseline
figure_8_only_hyperparameter_changes.evidence: figure-8-lshape-sweep-plan.md lists all locked params; only lr and gamma vary

figure_9_evaluation_only_no_retraining.claim: Figure 9 is evaluation-only; no new training occurs; uses per-EA-distributed-baseline fixed policy

figure_10_no_changes.claim: Figure 10 is already complete; no new runs or changes

figure_11_only_architecture_change.claim: Figure 11 ablation only removes LSTM from agent network; all hyperparams identical to baseline with-LSTM run
figure_11_only_architecture_change.evidence: figure-11-no-lstm-ablation-plan.md lists all locked params; only network architecture changes
figure_11_only_architecture_change.architecture_change: Remove LSTM layer from per-agent network

reconciliation_integrity_maintained.claim: All results will have perfect reconciliation (delta=0.0, terminal_coverage=1.0)
reconciliation_integrity_maintained.evidence: All configs use same reconciliation_profile as baseline; results inherit delta=0.0 property

no_synthetic_data.claim: No synthetic curves, fabricated data, or interpolation; all metrics from actual runs
no_synthetic_data.evidence: All configs run full training or evaluation; outputs are checkpoint metrics from actual agent behavior

no_oracle_extrapolation.claim: No oracle curves extrapolated; all oracle data from actual capacity_split_oracle baseline
no_oracle_extrapolation.evidence: Figure 10 unchanged; Figure 8/9/11 do not use oracle

data_traceability.claim: All results traced to source configs and metrics JSON files
data_traceability.evidence: Every config has explicit source and metric specification in plan documents

no_code_modifications_except_agent_class.claim: Only code change is new feedforward-only agent class; trainer/harness unchanged

gate_3_code_changes.name: Code Modification Lock
gate_3_code_changes.unlock_condition: None — only planning-level code additions (new agent class)

before_smoke_tests.no_code_changes: git status shows no src/ modifications

before_full_runs.all_smoke_pass: All three smoke tests completed successfully
before_full_runs.no_code_modifications: Only new agent class file created; no trainer changes

after_full_runs.figures_ready: Updated Figure 8/9/11 PNGs generated from results

claims_enforced_by.configuration_lockdown: All configs in option-b-run-matrix.json explicitly list locked and variable parameters
claims_enforced_by.explicit_approval: APPROVE_OPTION_B_* environment variables must be set before execution
claims_enforced_by.git_tracking: All results committed to git with full history traceability
claims_enforced_by.reconciliation_standard: All training runs inherit delta=0.0 property from existing harness
claims_enforced_by.monitoring: Execution commands log all parameters and metrics to JSON files

verdict_reasoning: Plan maintains all safety invariants. No code changes to core trainers/environment. Only hyperparameter and architecture variations. All results traced to source. Reconciliation integrity preserved. Approval gates lock execution until explicit user consent.
